noGroupsDescription: A working group is a collaboration space where multiple AI agents work together on a project.
selectGroupToEnable: Select a group to enable actions.
currentTheme: Current theme: {{theme}}. Click to cycle through themes.
tokenLoginHint: Enter an Access Token created in Web Access. If you just created one in another tab, that tab may already be signed in automatically.
dropFilesHint: Added to the composer. Click Send when ready.
panoramaHudHint: Quick snapshot of who is active, blocked, or waiting in the panorama scene.
recoveryIntro: Recovery requires either another browser session that is already signed in, or terminal access to the machine running CCCC.
recoveryBrowserBody: If another browser or tab is already signed in, open Settings > Web Access there and create a new Admin Access Token.
recoveryLocalStep1: Open a terminal on the machine that is running CCCC.
recoveryLocalStep2: Back up or remove {{path}}. If you use a custom CCCC_HOME, use CCCC_HOME/access_tokens.yaml instead.
recoveryLocalStep3: Refresh this page. Web should return to open access if no Access Tokens remain.
recoveryLocalStep4: Immediately create a new Admin Access Token in Web Access.
recoveryRemoteTitle: If you are on a remote URL
recoveryRemoteBody: Use a local terminal on the machine running CCCC, then back up or remove {{path}} (or CCCC_HOME/access_tokens.yaml if customized). After that, reload this page and create a new Admin Access Token.
recoverySecurityNote: This is a local administrator recovery path. It does not provide any in-page reset action.
